sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47971" key="qeastiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεαστικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, (θεάζὠ</foreign> <sense id="n47971.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐνθουσιαστικός, βῆμα</ref> </xr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Mim.Oxy.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">413.91</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
